Their playful look instantly elevates Christmas trees, mantel garlands, and party setups, spreading cheer in living rooms, offices, or event venues

【Versatile Use for Indoor and Outdoor Decor】You you can hang them on the Christmas tree or making green red christmas decorations, like wreath, Christmas tree ornaments, or garlands. The fuzzy christmas picks are also great for many occasions, such as office, porch, commercial decor and so on. Making your own crafts, vase fillers, etc, it can also become a beautiful Christmas gift

【Durable & Reusable with Minimal Shedding】The lime green christmas tree decor are crafted from quality materials that resist fading and shedding, these decorative picks are built to last through many holiday seasons. The sturdy stems maintain their shape even after repeated use. These green xmas tree picks will keep looking beautiful year after year without losing their vibrant appearance or texture

【12-Pack 17-Inch Christmas Tree Toppers for All Decor Needs】This set of 12 lime green christmas ornaments provides everything you need to create stunning holiday displays throughout your home.
